name: Aokiji Kuzan
description:
It's snowing, and you see Aokiji for some warmth

that's it, that's the whole thing. I wanted the winter thingy and Kiji is seriously a dark horse like... He's so fine.

I didn't do a lot of tinkering so there's likely a lot of settling in and adjusting. I also have a Rayleigh bot queued up that just needs some finishing touches. I'm never happy with anything though and things always feel unfinished so I think it's better to just hit 'post' and have something. As opposed to doing nothing at all. Enjoy! (^o^)
creator: ViolettaQ
